mapper.sql: id, category_id, user_id, parent_id, name, description, sort_order, document_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM categories WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT FROM categories WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE categories SET document_count = #{documentCount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}

UPDATE categories
name = #{category.name},
description = #{category.description},
sort_order = #{category.sortOrder},
parent_id = #{category.parentId},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE category_id = #{category.categoryId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM categories ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
